commands.notes: 11 test files and 85 tests passed with integration suite included.
Coverage remained above target: All files 95.65% statements, 97.7% branches.

verification.regression_notes: Added extension lifecycle integration tests that validate activation wiring, command registration handoff, tree provider startup mode, and lint diagnostics callback behavior.

handoff.summary: Implemented A4 integration coverage with a dedicated extension activation lifecycle test suite and included it in Vitest execution.
next_steps: Proceed to V1_integration_meta to validate final acceptance criteria and thresholds.
Optionally add real @vscode/test-electron runtime smoke tests if extension-host execution coverage is desired beyond mocked integration.
known_issues: Existing parser schema-path warnings in command tests remain unchanged and non-blocking.

notes: No production logic changes were required for A4; tests only.
